negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_062
prompt: The video opens with a view from over a shopping cart, positioned in front of a well-lit grocery store shelf filled with colorful boxes. The shelves are neatly arranged with various products, predominantly featuring bright packaging in shades of red, blue, pink, yellow, and green, adorned with cartoon characters and Japanese text. The cart itself has red accents, and it appears stationary at the beginning. Two robotic arms with black hands are visible over the cart. As the video progresses, the right hand reaches towards the shelf and lifts one of the yellow boxes, indicating the start of a shopping activity. The camera follows the motion closely, capturing the hand's interaction with the product. By the end of the sequence, the cart remains stationary, with the hand that has put a yellow box inside the cart. The background showcases a clean, organized store aisle with wooden shelving and a few other products visible in the distance.
